name: [ - HELL-HOUNDS UPD! - ] [ - Hazbin hotel - the flipside - ]
description:
"As punishment for their reckless act, Heaven cast Lucifer and his love into the dark pit he had created, never allowing him to see the good that came from humanity, only the cruel and wicked."

[ - As a fan of this show, i kinda wanted to give a few things a rework. I don't really think i will change much stuff, as i will make it more of a brutal AU: Less swearing, more violence and dark moments. Here i'll try to make hell feel like a challenge to live in. Sinners will have access to every single ring of Hell, but if they will leave Pride Ring, they'll have to fight for their lives. Basically turn up the difficulty to the hardcore. And Hazbin Hotel will be closed! Wheeze. - ]

[ - WHAT TO EXPECT:

  • Access to 5/7 rings - most global change i've done is giving sinners access to travel around rings of hell. But would they like it? Of course not, because let's say... hellborn demons don't really like sinners.

  • Added almost full set of known information about Hell from Hazbin and Helluva - yes, i was using wiki and some side sources with some of my own thinking, but this bot also features 4/7 deadly sins with their own look at sinners and situation at hell overall.

  • Different races - even though you may not be able to pick a Sin of Hell or Lucifer, you still can choose your race! A sinner, overlord, goetia,
creator: Driggor
